task.label: take the necessary technical and organisational measures for notices

conditions.condition: notices submitted by trusted flaggers acting within their designated area of expertise
notices submitted through the mechanisms referred to in Article 16
notices submitted by trusted flaggers acting within their designated area of expertise
notices submitted through the mechanisms referred to in Article 16
notices submitted by trusted flaggers acting within their designated area of expertise
notices submitted through the mechanisms referred to in Article 16
notices submitted by trusted flaggers acting within their designated area of expertise
notices submitted through the mechanisms referred to in Article 16

task.label: award the status of trusted flagger

conditions.condition: upon application by any entity
applicant is established
applicant has demonstrated that it meets all of the conditions from paragraph 2

task.label: publish easily comprehensible and detailed reports on notices submitted in accordance with Article 16

conditions.condition: at least once a year
covering notices submitted during the relevant period
reports shall include an explanation of the procedures in place to ensure that the trusted flagger retains its independence

task.label: send reports to the Digital Services Coordinator
include personal data in annual reports
communicate to the Commission and the Board the names, addresses and email addresses of entities awarded, suspended, or revoked trusted flagger status

conditions.condition: following award of trusted flagger status in accordance with paragraph 2
or following suspension of trusted flagger status in accordance with paragraph 6
or following revocation of trusted flagger status in accordance with paragraph 7

task.label: publish information in a publicly available database

conditions.condition: based on the information referred to in paragraph 4 communicated by Digital Services Coordinators

task.label: communicate information to the Digital Services Coordinator

conditions.condition: where the provider has information indicating that a trusted flagger has submitted a significant number of insufficiently precise, inaccurate or inadequately substantiated notices through the mechanisms referred to in Article 16
including information gathered in connection with the processing of complaints through internal complaint-handling systems referred to in Article 20(4)

task.label: suspend the status of trusted flagger

conditions.condition: upon receiving information from a provider of online platforms pursuant to paragraph 6
if the Digital Services Coordinator considers that there are legitimate reasons to open an investigation
following suspension of trusted flagger status under paragraph 6
without undue delay

task.label: afford the entity an opportunity to react to the investigation findings

conditions.condition: before revoking the trusted flagger status of an entity
the entity no longer meets the conditions set out in paragraph 2
after affording the entity an opportunity to react pursuant to paragraph 7
before issuing guidelines under paragraph 8
where necessary
after consulting the Board
